_publications._publicationTitle: PERADIGM: Phenotype embedding similarity-based rare disease gene mapping.

_contextSnippet: due to the low prevalence of ADPKD in the UK Biobank dataset, only 142 patients were coded as either Q61.2 or Q61.3
details: Contained 142 ADPKD patients coded as Q61.2 or Q61.3, 39 Marfan syndrome patients (Q87.4), and 62 NF1 patients (Q85.0) with comprehensive ICD-10 phenotype data
